evidence: This is a great family, feel good movie that my husband and I really enjoyed!!!
This movie had great special effects, was quick moving but it also had a moral to it and made you think.
The acting was great and the plot really pulls you in!
Great story line, intrigue and just enough humor.
This movie was fun, clever and worth watching multiple times!!
Fast moving with good character development.
Excellent movie but the quality was horrible!!!
The special effects were amazing and the plot lines very interesting.
The special effects were very well done and brought you into the story line even more.
Hated to see it end but was so grateful that they ended the show as well as the series was.

summary: The user enjoys family-friendly and action-oriented content with fast pacing and a straightforward narrative. They appreciate good acting and special effects, while also valuing emotional engagement in the stories they watch.
